# MCP Conformance Tests - Tools
# Tests for tool listing, invocation, and error handling

# Start the test server with tool capabilities
exec mcp-scripttest-server --stdio --capabilities=tools --list-change-support --tools=get_weather,calculator,search,fetch_image
cmp stderr "MCP server listening on stdio"

# Initialize the server connection
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"ToolsTestClient","version":"1.0.0"}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"capabilities":'
stdout '"tools":'

setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"notifications/initialized"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio

# ============================
# TOOL LISTING TESTS
# ============================

# TEST 1: Basic Tool Listing
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"tools/list"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"tools":'
stdout '"name":"get_weather"'
stdout '"name":"calculator"'
stdout '"name":"search"'
stdout '"name":"fetch_image"'

# TEST 2: Tool Schema Information
# Each tool should include a description and input schema
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":3,"method":"tools/list"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"description":'
stdout '"inputSchema":'
stdout '"type":"object"'
stdout '"properties":'
stdout '"required":'

# TEST 3: Tool Pagination
exec mcp-scripttest-server --stdio --capabilities=tools --many-tools=20
cmp stderr "MCP server listening on stdio"

# Initialize the server connection
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":4,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"ToolsTestClient","version":"1.0.0"}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'

setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"notifications/initialized"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio

# First page of results with pagination
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":5,"method":"tools/list","params":{"limit":10}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"tools":'
stdout '"nextCursor":'
# Should have exactly 10 tools
stdout -count=10 '"name":'

# Second page using the cursor
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":6,"method":"tools/list","params":{"cursor":"$CURSOR_FROM_RESPONSE"}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"tools":'
# Should have the remaining tools
stdout -count=10 '"name":'
! stdout '"nextCursor":'

# ============================
# TOOL INVOCATION TESTS
# ============================

# Start a fresh server
exec mcp-scripttest-server --stdio --capabilities=tools --tools=get_weather,calculator,fetch_image
cmp stderr "MCP server listening on stdio"

# Initialize the server connection
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":7,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"ToolsTestClient","version":"1.0.0"}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'

setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"notifications/initialized"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio

# TEST 4: Basic Tool Invocation
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":8,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_weather","arguments":{"location":"New York"}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"content":'
stdout '"type":"text"'
stdout '"text":'
stdout '"isError":false'

# TEST 5: Tool Invocation with Complex Arguments
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":9,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"calculator","arguments":{"operation":"add","operands":[10,20,30]}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"content":'
stdout '"type":"text"'
stdout '"text":"60"'
stdout '"isError":false'

# TEST 6: Tool with Multiple Content Types in Response
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":10,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"fetch_image","arguments":{"query":"mountain landscape"}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"content":'
# Should have text and image contents
stdout '"type":"text"'
stdout '"type":"image"'
stdout '"data":'
stdout '"mimeType":"image/png"'
stdout '"isError":false'

# ============================
# TOOL CONTENT TYPE TESTS
# ============================

# TEST 7: Text Content Type
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":11,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_weather","arguments":{"location":"London"}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"content":'
stdout '"type":"text"'
stdout '"text":'

# TEST 8: Image Content Type
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":12,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"fetch_image","arguments":{"query":"city skyline"}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"content":'
stdout '"type":"image"'
stdout '"data":'
stdout '"mimeType":"image/png"'

# TEST 9: Resource Content Type
exec mcp-scripttest-server --stdio --capabilities=tools,resources --tools=fetch_resource
cmp stderr "MCP server listening on stdio"

# Initialize the server connection
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":13,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"ToolsTestClient","version":"1.0.0"}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'

setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"notifications/initialized"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio

# Call a tool that returns a resource
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":14,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"fetch_resource","arguments":{"id":"example-resource"}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"content":'
stdout '"type":"resource"'
stdout '"resource":'
stdout '"uri":"resource://'
stdout '"mimeType":'
stdout '"text":'

# ============================
# TOOL ERROR HANDLING TESTS
# ============================

# TEST 10: Unknown Tool
exec mcp-scripttest-server --stdio --capabilities=tools
cmp stderr "MCP server listening on stdio"

# Initialize the server connection
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":15,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"ToolsTestClient","version":"1.0.0"}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'

setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"notifications/initialized"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio

# Call a non-existent tool (protocol error)
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":16,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"non_existent_tool","arguments":{}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"error":'
stdout '"code":'
stdout '"message":"Unknown tool: non_existent_tool"'

# TEST 11: Invalid Tool Arguments
# Call a tool with invalid arguments (protocol error)
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":17,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"calculator","arguments":{"operation":"divide","operands":[10,0]}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"error":'
stdout '"code":'
stdout '"message":"Invalid arguments"'

# TEST 12: Tool Execution Error
# Call a tool that returns an execution error (not a protocol error)
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":18,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_weather","arguments":{"location":"invalid_location_that_causes_error"}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"content":'
stdout '"type":"text"'
stdout '"text":"Failed to fetch weather data:'
stdout '"isError":true'

# ============================
# TOOL LIST CHANGED NOTIFICATION TESTS
# ============================

# TEST 13: List Changed Notification
exec mcp-scripttest-server --stdio --capabilities=tools --list-change-support --dynamic-tools
cmp stderr "MCP server listening on stdio"

# Initialize the server connection
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":19,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"ToolsTestClient","version":"1.0.0"}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"capabilities":'
stdout '"tools":{"listChanged":true}'

setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"notifications/initialized"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio

# Initial tool list
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":20,"method":"tools/list"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"tools":'

# Trigger tool list change
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":21,"method":"test/trigger_tool_change"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'

# Server should send notification
stdout '"jsonrpc":"2.0"'
stdout '"method":"notifications/tools/list_changed"'

# Verify updated tool list
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":22,"method":"tools/list"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"tools":'
stdout '"name":"new_tool"'
